creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #2)
Not scriptable. Upstream doesn't have a defined cadence for when they start and stop supporting specific external LLVM versions based on N-1 or N-2: https://rustc-dev-guide.rust-lang.org/backend/updating-llvm.html

Comment 3 is one way of keeping abreast but I follow the upstream pull requests directly, since each bump references the previous one.
